content:
The ForgeTorque Pro 3000 detects calibration drift before it causes a failure. That is not a marketing claim — it is how the integrated display works: when drift exceeds 0.3%, the operator is alerted before the fastener is applied.

At ±0.5% accuracy across its full torque range — independently verified to ISO 6789-2:2017 — the Pro 3000 meets the specification requirements for aerospace-grade assembly. It is IP68 rated, ATEX certified for explosive atmospheres, and compatible with ISO, DIN, and ANSI fastener standards.

Bluetooth sync connects directly to maintenance management systems, and auto-shutdown memory retains the last 50 torque readings for audit trails. The ergonomic anti-fatigue grip is designed for full 8-hour shift use without operator fatigue-induced measurement error.

Used by Tier-1 aerospace OEMs and over 4,000 MRO facilities worldwide. ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing. 3-year calibration warranty.

When precision is a requirement, not a feature, the ForgeTorque Pro 3000 is the instrument of record.
